text:
アタシと彼、そして
あなたの三人で任務に向かいたいの。
構わないかしら？

本っ当に不本意だが
上の命令で組まされた以上
一緒に戦わなきゃならねぇ。

だが、コイツと二人っきりってのは……
心配しかねぇんだ。
頼む！　一緒に来て

I'd like for the three of us... you, me, and
him... to take on a mission together. I trust
you don't mind?

It ain't my bag, but if the brass wants us
fightin' together on an assignment, then
I guess we're fightin' together.

Just... don't leave me alone with her. Please?
I'm beggin' ya, you gotta come with us!
